description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a mix of light wood and dark brick exterior finishes. The front facade has large vertical windows and a recessed balcony area, partially shaded by a tree and surrounded by landscaped greenery. The ground level is paved with light gray tiles, extending around the building and providing a clean, urban look. The side and rear facades are simpler, with fewer windows and a consistent wood paneling. The house appears to have three stories, with the upper floors featuring balconies and large glass doors. The landscaping includes a prominent tree and shrubbery, adding natural contrast to the geometric architecture.
description: A modern, three-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a mix of wood and brick finishes, surrounded by urban landscaping and a prominent tree.
description_view_0: The side view shows a tall, flat facade with vertical windows and minimal detailing, highlighting the wood paneling and paved ground.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the main entry, large windows, recessed balconies, and lush landscaping with a tree and shrubs.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the balconies, glass doors, and the tree partially obscuring the facade, with more visible greenery.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a plain wood-paneled wall with minimal windows and some greenery visible on the left side.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with large glass door, no steps, integrated into a paved area with adjacent landscaping and a balcony above
